title: Cyathea atahuallpa
taxonomy: Cyathea atahuallpa is a species of tree fern. It belongs to the family Cyatheaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the tree ferns. Within the Cyatheaceae family, Cyathea atahuallpa is classified in the genus Cyathea, a diverse group of tree ferns that are native to various parts of the world. The genus Cyathea is further divided into several subgenera, with Cyathea atahuallpa belonging to one of these subgenera. This classification helps to identify and distinguish Cyathea atahuallpa from other species of tree ferns.
